title: Homeownership Made Possible
audience: Minority first-time homebuyers in Marion County
goal: Encourage viewers to check their eligibility for a down payment grant
hook: The down payment isn't the barrier you think it is — not if you live in Marion County.

scenes.headline: The down payment isn't the barrier you think it is — not if you live in Marion County.
scenes.caption_text: Think you can't afford a home?
scenes.voiceover: The down payment isn't the barrier you think it is — not if you live in Marion County.

assets.description: Cinematic close-up of a Black woman, worried and exhausted, sitting in a dim apartment — portrait, dramatic side light

lines: Too much debt? Too little savings?
scenes.headline: You’re not alone in this.
scenes.voiceover: Many feel that homeownership is out of reach because of the down payment. You’re not alone in this.

scenes.headline: A grant can change everything.
scenes.body: You might be surprised to learn that there’s a grant available for minority first-time homebuyers that covers your down payment entirely.
scenes.voiceover: You might be surprised to learn that there’s a grant available for minority first-time homebuyers that covers your down payment entirely.

scenes.headline: Imagine your new home.
scenes.body: Picture walking into your new home, keys in hand, without worrying about a hefty upfront cost.
scenes.voiceover: Imagine walking into your new home, keys in hand, without worrying about a hefty upfront cost.

assets.description: Cinematic portrait of a joyful Black family holding house keys outside their first home, tears of joy, warm golden hour light

scenes.headline: Take action now!
scenes.cta_text: See if you qualify — it takes 2 minutes
scenes.voiceover: See if you qualify — it takes just 2 minutes.

voiceover_script: The down payment isn't the barrier you think it is — not if you live in Marion County. Many feel that homeownership is out of reach because of the down payment. You might be surprised to learn that there’s a grant available for minority first-time homebuyers that covers your down payment entirely. Imagine walking into your new home, keys in hand, without worrying about a hefty upfront cost. This grant does not need to be repaid, making it easier for you to own your dream home. See if you qualify — it takes just 2 minutes.
thumbnail_concept: Joyful family celebrating with house keys, bright background
caption: Discover how you can own a home with a down payment grant! Find out if you qualify today.
caption_hook: Homeownership is closer than you think
